reason: All skill-relevant API and behavior changes introduced in this merge commit are already captured in prior delta files. The commit merges docs/main into v5.0.2-beta.22 and introduces: (1) new CRDT core-stores pages (array/map/text/xml) — per-type setup guides for APIs already documented in core-store-types.md, core-store-v2-api.md, and core-store-update.md; (2) TipTap/BlockNote/CodeMirror docs overhauls — major prose expansions of the v2 useCollaboration/createCollaboration API already covered in tiptap-collaboration-manager.md, blocknote-setup-react.md, and codemirror-collaboration-manager.md; (3) self-host-data/notifications.mdx additions (Writing Resolver-Eligible Notifications section) — the notificationSource: 'custom' + isNotificationResolverUsed: true REST write pattern is fully documented in provider-notification.md; (4) security/proxy-server.mdx restructuring — prose/layout rewrite with no new proxyConfig fields beyond what core-proxy-overview.md already documents; (5) backend-sdks/python.mdx expansion — sdk.api.* namespace already covered in python-rest-api-backend.md; (6) wireframe-variables pages (comments, notifications, recorder, cursors, presence, etc.) — UI customization CSS variable tables with no skill-relevant API changes; (7) release note entries for 5.0.2-beta.19, beta.20, beta.21, and beta.22 — processed in plugin-agent-1-skills-deltas-5.0.2-beta.19.json, plugin-agent-1-skills-deltas-5.0.2-beta.21.json, and plugin-agent-1-skills-deltas-5.0.2-beta.22.json respectively.

skipped.reason: Per-type setup guides for useStore/createVeltStore APIs already fully documented in core-store-types.md (type table + source links) and core-store-v2-api.md (full API surface). No new method, param, or type introduced.
Prose expansion of v2 useCollaboration / createCollaboration API already covered in tiptap-collaboration-manager.md. No new methods or parameters introduced.

Major prose expansion documenting useCollaboration (React) and createCollaboration / manager.getCollaborationConfig() (non-React) — already fully covered in blocknote-setup-react.md and the shared tiptap/blocknote collaboration-manager rules. No net-new API surface.
Prose expansion of useCollaboration / manager.getCollaborationPrimitives() already documented in codemirror-collaboration-manager.md. No new API.
Restructured to add CardGroup links to the four core-stores pages. API reference section (useStore, useAwareness, createVeltStore) content unchanged from what skill rules already document.

The notificationSource: 'custom' + isNotificationResolverUsed: true REST write pattern, minimal POST body, and sample data split are already fully documented in provider-notification.md (lines 110-164).
Prose and layout rewrite (added Why section, table, diagram, Quick Start tabs). No new proxyConfig fields. The forceLongPolling field was already in core-proxy-overview.md. No skill delta required.

Expanded documentation for the velt-py SDK. The sdk.api.* namespace, VeltValidationError/VeltTokenError/VeltApiError, and environment variable support are already captured in python-rest-api-backend.md from the prior velt-py-0.1.9 delta run.

API reference reformatting and prose additions. New entries reflect APIs already captured in skill rules from prior delta runs. No net-new API surface requiring skill rule creation.
Data model additions (StoreConfig, UseStoreConfig, UseStoreReturn, AddCommentDraftEvent, etc.) are documentation for APIs already captured in skill rules. No new standalone skill rule required.
Internal tooling and navigation structure — no skill-relevant changes.
